audit_items.proof_trace: Callers assume get_compressed_output_stream never returns NULL, but invalid compress_type leads to SCHECK(false) which may not abort if log handler is disabled, resulting in NULL return. No NULL check before dereference in rpc_client_impl.cc and binary_rpc_request.cc.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends RPC with invalid compress_type (e.g., 999), causing SCHECK(false) to log and continue (if log handler disabled), returning NULL. Subsequent SerializeToZeroCopyStream(NULL) crashes process.
